hero.title: Keep your hunt clean and organized
hero.subtitle: Built for hunters who leave nothing behind

bullets: No more shells in your pockets

privacy.title: Privacy
text: We respect your privacy and only collect information necessary to process your order.
Your data will never be sold or shared with third parties for marketing purposes.
We use secure payment providers to ensure your information is protected.
By using this site, you agree to our data practices.

returns.title: Returns
text: Items must be unused and in original condition to be eligible for a return.
To start a return, contact us and we’ll guide you through the process.
Return shipping costs are the responsibility of the customer unless the item is defective.

shipping.title: Shipping
text: We ship to the US, Canada, and EU.
Orders are processed within 1–3 business days.
Delivery times typically range between 5–10 business days.
Shipping costs are calculated at checkout.
You will receive a tracking link once your order has been shipped.
